summary: The worker delivered a well-architected multiplayer implementation using Supabase Realtime, with clean code, passing builds, and zero quality issues. All required deliverables are present and the existing single-device mode remains intact. However, actionability is limited to 3 because Rob must manually set up Supabase (worker cannot provision without credentials), creating a dependency that requires external work before the feature is live—this is unavoidable given the constraints but delays full deployment readiness.
